snippets.C0014:
<?php
// Caso: Validar paréntesis/corchetes/llaves | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Stacks

function solve(string $s): bool {
  $st = [];
  $pairs = [')'=>'(', ']'=>'[', '}'=>'{'];
  foreach (str_split($s) as $ch) {
    if ($ch==='('||$ch==='['||$ch==='{') $st[] = $ch;
    else if ($ch===')'||$ch===']'||$ch==='}') {
      $top = array_pop($st);
      if ($top !== $pairs[$ch]) return false;
    }
  }
  return count($st) === 0;
}

// Caso: Two Sum | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Map/Hash

function solve(array $arr, int $target): ?array {
  $seen = [];
  foreach ($arr as $i => $x) {
    $need = $target - $x;
    if (isset($seen[$need])) return [$seen[$need], $i];
    $seen[$x] = $i;
  }
  return null;
}

<?php
// Caso: Rotar arreglo k | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Arrays

function solve(array $arr, int $k): array {
  $n = count($arr);
  if ($n === 0) return [];
  $r = (($k % $n) + $n) % $n;
  if ($r === 0) return $arr;
  return array_merge(array_slice($arr, -$r), array_slice($arr, 0, $n - $r));
}

snippets.C0021:
<?php
// Caso: Búsqueda binaria | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Búsqueda

function solve(array $arr, int $target): int {
  $lo=0; $hi=count($arr)-1;
  while ($lo <= $hi) {
    $mid = intdiv($lo + $hi, 2);
    if ($arr[$mid] === $target) return $mid;
    if ($arr[$mid] < $target) $lo = $mid + 1; else $hi = $mid - 1;
  }
  return -1;
}

function solve(array $arr): array {
  $a = $arr; $n = count($a);
  for ($i=0;$i<$n;$i++) {
    for ($j=0;$j<$n-1-$i;$j++) {
      if ($a[$j] > $a[$j+1]) { $t=$a[$j]; $a[$j]=$a[$j+1]; $a[$j+1]=$t; }
    }
  }
  return $a;
}

<?php
// Caso: Validar RUT chileno | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Validación

function solve(string $rut): bool {
  $clean = strtoupper(preg_replace('/[\.\-\s]/', '', (string)$rut));
  if (strlen($clean) < 2) return false;

  $body = substr($clean, 0, -1);
  $dv = substr($clean, -1);

  if (!ctype_digit($body)) return false;

  $sum = 0;
  $mul = 2;
  for ($i = strlen($body) - 1; $i >= 0; $i--) {
    $sum += (int)$body[$i] * $mul;
    $mul = ($mul == 7) ? 2 : ($mul + 1);
  }

  $mod = 11 - ($sum % 11);
  $dvCalc = ($mod == 11) ? '0' : (($mod == 10) ? 'K' : (string)$mod);

  return $dv === $dvCalc;
}

<?php
// C0649 · Gráfico de barras simple
function solve(): void {
  $w=600; $h=400;
  $im = imagecreatetruecolor($w,$h);
  $white = imagecolorallocate($im,255,255,255);
  $black = imagecolorallocate($im,0,0,0);
  $blue  = imagecolorallocate($im,40,120,220);
  imagefilledrectangle($im,0,0,$w,$h,$white);
  $labels = ["A","B","C"]; $vals = [3,7,5]; $max = max($vals);
  $barW=80; $gap=40; $baseY=340; $x=120;
  for ($i=0; $i<count($vals); $i++) {
    $bh = (int)(($vals[$i]/$max)*220);
    imagefilledrectangle($im,$x,$baseY-$bh,$x+$barW,$baseY,$blue);
    imagestring($im,5,$x+30,$baseY+10,$labels[$i],$black);
    imagestring($im,4,$x+30,$baseY-$bh-20,(string)$vals[$i],$black);
    $x += $barW + $gap;
  }
  imagepng($im,"barras.png");
  imagedestroy($im);
}

<?php
// C0650 · Leer/Escribir CSV (UTF-8) (Intermedio, IO)
function solve(): void {
  $in = fopen("input.csv", "r");
  if (!$in) throw new RuntimeException("No se pudo abrir input.csv");
  $out = fopen("output.csv", "w");
  $headers = fgetcsv($in);
  if (!$headers) throw new RuntimeException("CSV vacío");
  fputcsv($out, $headers);

  $emailIdx = array_search("Email", $headers, true);
  while (($row = fgetcsv($in)) !== false) {
    if ($emailIdx !== false && isset($row[$emailIdx])) {
      $row[$emailIdx] = strtolower(trim($row[$emailIdx]));
    }
    fputcsv($out, $row);
  }
  fclose($in); fclose($out);
}

// C0651 · Consumir API HTTP (GET y POST JSON) (Intermedio, HTTP)
function solve(): array {
  // GET
  $get = file_get_contents("https://httpbin.org/get");
  $getJson = json_decode($get, true);

  // POST JSON (cURL)
  $ch = curl_init("https://httpbin.org/post");
  curl_setopt_array($ch, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_POST => true,
    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => ["Content-Type: application/json"],
    CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => json_encode(["hello" => "world"]),
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 10,
  ]);
  $post = curl_exec($ch);
  if ($post === false) throw new RuntimeException(curl_error($ch));
  curl_close($ch);
  $postJson = json_decode($post, true);

  return ["get"=>$getJson, "post"=>$postJson];
}

<?php
// C0658 · JSON grande (streaming) (Avanzado, IO)
// PHP · NDJSON streaming
function solve(string $path="data.ndjson"): int {
  $fh = fopen($path, "r");
  if (!$fh) return 0;
  $count = 0;
  while (($line = fgets($fh)) !== false) {
    $line = trim($line);
    if ($line === "") continue;
    json_decode($line, true);
    if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE) $count++;
  }
  fclose($fh);
  return $count;
}

// C0661 · Retry + backoff + timeout (Intermedio, Resiliencia)
function solve(int $maxRetries = 5): void {
  $attempt = 0;
  $delayMs = 200;
  while (true) {
    $attempt++;
    try {
      // doWork()
      if (mt_rand() / mt_getrandmax() < 0.7) throw new RuntimeException("fail");
      return; // ok
    } catch (Throwable $e) {
      if ($attempt >= $maxRetries) throw $e;
      usleep($delayMs * 1000);
      $delayMs = min($delayMs * 2, 5000);
    }
  }
}

<?php
// C0666 · Merge sort (Intermedio, Algoritmos)
function solve(array $arr): array {
  $n = count($arr);
  if ($n <= 1) return $arr;
  $mid = intdiv($n, 2);
  $left = array_slice($arr, 0, $mid);
  $right = array_slice($arr, $mid);

  $left = solve($left);
  $right = solve($right);

  $out = [];
  $i = 0; $j = 0;
  while ($i < count($left) && $j < count($right)) {
    if ($left[$i] <= $right[$j]) $out[] = $left[$i++];
    else $out[] = $right[$j++];
  }
  while ($i < count($left)) $out[] = $left[$i++];
  while ($j < count($right)) $out[] = $right[$j++];
  return $out;
}

<?php
// C0667 · BFS/DFS (grafo) (Intermedio, Algoritmos)
function bfs(array $graph, string $start): array {
  $q = [$start];
  $seen = [$start => true];
  $out = [];
  while ($q) {
    $v = array_shift($q);
    $out[] = $v;
    foreach (($graph[$v] ?? []) as $n) {
      if (!isset($seen[$n])) { $seen[$n] = true; $q[] = $n; }
    }
  }
  return $out;
}

function dfs(array $graph, string $start): array {
  $seen = [];
  $out = [];
  $visit = function($v) use (&$visit, &$seen, &$out, $graph) {
    $seen[$v] = true; $out[] = $v;
    foreach (($graph[$v] ?? []) as $n) {
      if (!isset($seen[$n])) $visit($n);
    }
  };
  $visit($start);
  return $out;
}

<?php
// C0668 · A* (pathfinding) (Avanzado, Algoritmos)
/**
 * grid: array of rows (0=free,1=wall), start/goal: [x,y]
 * Retorna ruta como lista de [x,y].
 */
function solve(array $grid, array $start, array $goal): array {
  $h = count($grid);
  $w = count($grid[0]);

  $hcost = fn($a,$b) => abs($a[0]-$b[0]) + abs($a[1]-$b[1]);
  $key = fn($p) => $p[0].','.$p[1];

  $neighbors = function($p) use ($grid,$w,$h) {
    $x=$p[0]; $y=$p[1];
    $out=[];
    foreach ([[1,0],[-1,0],[0,1],[0,-1]] as $d) {
      $nx=$x+$d[0]; $ny=$y+$d[1];
      if ($nx>=0 && $ny>=0 && $nx<$w && $ny<$h && $grid[$ny][$nx]==0) $out[] = [$nx,$ny];
    }
    return $out;
  };

  $open = [[ $hcost($start,$goal), $start ]];
  $came = []; // key => prev point
  $g = [ $key($start) => 0 ];

  while ($open) {
    usort($open, fn($a,$b) => $a[0] <=> $b[0]);
    [$f,$cur] = array_shift($open);
    if ($cur[0]===$goal[0] && $cur[1]===$goal[1]) {
      // reconstruct
      $path = [$cur];
      $ck = $key($cur);
      while (isset($came[$ck])) {
        $cur = $came[$ck];
        $path[] = $cur;
        $ck = $key($cur);
      }
      return array_reverse($path);
    }
    foreach ($neighbors($cur) as $nb) {
      $nk = $key($nb);
      $ng = $g[$key($cur)] + 1;
      if (!isset($g[$nk]) || $ng < $g[$nk]) {
        $g[$nk] = $ng;
        $came[$nk] = $cur;
        $open[] = [ $ng + $hcost($nb,$goal), $nb ];
      }
    }
  }
  return [];
}

<?php
// C0669 · LRU cache (Intermedio, Algoritmos)
class LRU {
  private int $cap;
  private array $map = [];     // key => value
  private array $order = [];   // keys in LRU order (oldest..newest)

  public function __construct(int $cap){ $this->cap = $cap; }

  public function get(string $k): mixed {
    if (!array_key_exists($k, $this->map)) return null;
    $this->touch($k);
    return $this->map[$k];
  }

  public function put(string $k, mixed $v): void {
    $this->map[$k] = $v;
    $this->touch($k);
    if (count($this->order) > $this->cap) {
      $oldest = array_shift($this->order);
      unset($this->map[$oldest]);
    }
  }

  private function touch(string $k): void {
    $idx = array_search($k, $this->order, true);
    if ($idx !== false) array_splice($this->order, $idx, 1);
    $this->order[] = $k;
  }
}
